feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Post on the left, your threads on the right, full community below (loaded from the API).
feedback.loginRequired: Feedback requires sign-in. After you log in, lists load from the server.
feedback.emptyYourFeedback: You haven’t posted any feedback yet.
feedback.emptyWall: No posts yet. Be the first to share feedback!
feedback.loadError: Could not load posts. Try again later.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: Describe your feedback, steps to reproduce, or your idea…
feedback.errorGeneric: Could not send. Please try again later.
feedback.replyValidationMin: Message must be at least {min} characters.
feedback.notFoundFeedback: This feedback could not be found.
